name: Shinobird Pigeon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊魂鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エスプリット・バード</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>伝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つたえ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn: You can target 1 other Spirit monster on the field; return it to the hand. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return it to the hand.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn: You can target 1 other Spirit monster on the field; return it to the hand. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return it to the hand.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn: You can target 1 other Spirit monster on the field; return it to the hand. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return it to the hand.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
